string.text: The improved stalker exoskeleton is a combination of a three-layered kevlar fabric merged with the "sovereign" compound, a plexiglass lining, and a reinforced built-in body armor. It is equipped with three built-in artifact containers.

Standard army steel helmet. It does not provide protection against anomalies or radiation, but it can deflect bullets. It was in demand in the Zone only during the initial clashes between factions. Equipped with a first-generation night vision device.
